intermediatePolicy: Meshy generated separate full-character GLBs per animation. Those were used locally to build the combined runtime GLB and are intentionally not runtime files for this pass.
notes: Generated through the local secret broker; no API keys are stored in this metadata.
The runtime GLB contains one mesh/skeleton with ten embedded animation clips for character debug.
Meshy intermediate animation GLBs are retained as source artifacts only; runtime code must load the combined GLB.
The combined runtime GLB is still above the 6 MB target and needs a later optimization pass before gameplay/cutscene use.
